title: Failure Classification, Retry Budgets, Backoff, and Load Shedding · Compiler Case: Dependency Outage Pause
summary: Every exception is requeued immediately, permanent schema failures block healthy work, a database outage causes a retry storm, and attempt counts exist only in process memory. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dependency outage pause increment in failure taxonomy and bounded retry policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pause or shed broad consumer work when a shared dependency is unavailable instead of scheduling delayed retries for every message.
Apply exponential backoff and jitter without blocking consumer slots or requeueing hot loops and preserve intended availability time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Dependency Outage Pause · Theory Dependency Outage Pause
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 3442 in a regional incident workflow during one broker-node restart. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to classify permanent and ambiguous outcomes before applying both attempt and age budgets; keep reconnection and retry work cancellable under one deadline; then remove the dead-letter binding and expose the resulting retention risk. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Dependency Outage Pause contract for the supplied data.
